bead.title: decomposition: Step 0 heightened hint > 8000 bytes; depth-2 cap
bead.description: Tune the existing Step 0 decomposition prompt: heightened hint when bead description > 8000 bytes. Add a depth-2 cap on auto-decomposition (a decomposed child cannot itself decompose more than once).
bead.acceptance: 1. Step 0 prompt has size-conditional hint. 2. Depth-2 cap enforced (3rd-level decomposition rejected with explanation). 3. Tests cover the cap.
